imageAlt: Invoice turbocharging: email content history roadmap item preview image
title: Invoice turbocharging: email content history
summaryBody: Improved record keeping for invoice management. This will allow our customers to see not just the history of when invoice emails were sent but the content of those emails as well.
detailBody: Improved record keeping for invoice management. This will allow our customers to see not just the history of when invoice emails were sent but the content of those emails as well.
